titleStmt.title: SII 38.419: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 419. (A.R. No. 419 of 1912.) VAḺUVŪR, MAYAVARAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Vīraṭṭānēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājarāja II Year: 14+1 Tula, ba. 10 Tuesday, Āyilayam = 27th September 1160 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription which is damaged in several places, records that the temple officials, dēvarkaṉimigal and śrīmāhēśvarakkaṇkāṇi gave an undertaking to Araṅgam- uḍaiyāṉ Tiruveṇkāḍu-uḍaiyān and another individual (name lost) hailing from a village (name damaged) in Āṟkāṭṭu-kkūṟṟam in Pāṇḍikulāśaṉi-vaḷanāḍu after the receipt of 100 kāśu (from both the persons) for burning two perpetual lamps to the god Tiruvīraṭṭāṉam-uḍaiyār at Vaḻugūr, a brahmadāyam in Tiruveḻundūr-nāḍu, (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. It is also stated that the latter donor (name lost) made this gift of lamp for the merit of a certain lady Kundavai. It further informs that the temple authorities bought land with this gifted amount, for burning two lamps out of the produce of land after remitting land tax. Besides this two lamps-stands weighing one hundred and twenty palam were also donated for the same purpose and the temple officials agreed to execute this charity and also put up an inscription to this effect.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
.§ svastiśrī . rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 patinālāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu daśamiyum cevvāk kiḻamiyumRead kiḻamaiyumpeṟṟa Āyileya
koṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruveḻuntūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam vaḻukūr Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiyār koyil kalveṭṭu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu
nāṭṭu vitaṉūrk ko ḻāna ṭaraṅkamuṭaiyān tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyān Innāḷāl A mutal cantirātittavaṟ cellakkaṭavatāka vaitta tiruna
onṟum pāṇṭukulācanivaḷanāṭṭu Āṟkāṭṭukkūṟṟattuc ciṟṟākkāṭṭuc ca ṭu kiḻavan kaṇann=tiruceva muṭaiyān maka
r Arayan kuntavaikku nanṟāka vaitta tirununtāviḷakku Onṟum Āka tirunantāviḷakku Iraṇṭum Erikkaikku vum tiruttavum cipaṇṭāra
ttu Oṭukkin kācu 100 nūṟṟukkum nilaṅkoṇṭuviṭṭapaṭi Innāṭṭu Akaram virirācentiraccarumpetiRead virarācentira caruppetimaṅkala kai Iṉta tevakkuṭu Uriy �
kku kiruṣṇavākkālukku teṟku munṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu natta nilam kiḻmukkālum Iṅke nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu nālām catira ttu kiḻ mukkāṇiyum Āka
koṇṭatoru māvāka vanta nattam Uṭpaṭa nilam Oru mā mukkāṇi kiḻ mukkālum Amara komānpaṭṭan pakkal piḷḷai nāmattu vilaikoṇṭu Ūr yiṟuttu mikuti
It tirununtāviḷakku Iraṇṭum cantirātittavaṟ Erikka kaṭavatāka Ikkācu nūṟum cipaṇṭārattu Oṭukkakkoṇṭu Erikkak kaṭavatāka [ śammatittu] viḷakku Erikkaikku meṟpaṭiyāṉ Iṭṭa muccāṇ nālviral niḷat
tu tarākkuttiviḷakku Iraṇṭināl Uttecappaṭi tarāviṭai nūṟṟipatiṉpalamum Oṭukka koṇṭu Ittirununtāviḷakku Iraṇṭum Ikkoyil devarkanmikaḷum cimāheśvarakaṇkāṇi cey ḷum cantirātittavaṟ
Erikkakkaṭavomāka sammatittukkalveṭṭikkuṭuttom Ivvanaivom ... §
Digital edition of SII 38.419 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
